options.description: Legend position (Top, Bottom, Left, Right, Corner)

options.description: Show category name in data labels

set-placement, set-data-labels, get-axis-scale, set-axis-scale, get-gridlines,

delete-trendline, set-trendline.

commands.name: daemon
start
commands.description: Start the daemon in the background.

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show daemon status and active sessions.

commands.description: Stop the daemon.

Daemon management. The daemon holds Excel sessions across 
CLI invocations.

options.description: Read DAX query from file instead of command line

options.description: Read DMV query from file instead of command line

options.name: --expression-file
options.description: Read DAX formula from file instead of command line

arguments.name: ACTION
arguments.description:
The action to perform (e.g., list-tables, 
create-measure, evaluate)

commands.description:
Data Model operations. Actions: list-tables, read-table, 
list-columns, list-measures, read, create-measure, update-measure,

commands.name: datamodelrel

options.name: --active
options.description:
Set relationship as active (default: true). Use 
--active false for inactive.

options.name: --from-column
options.description: Column in from-table that links to to-table

options.name: --from-table
options.description:
Source (many-side) table name containing the foreign 
key

options.name: --to-column
options.description:
Column in to-table that from-column links to (usually 
primary key)

options.name: --to-table
options.description:
Target (one-side/lookup) table name containing the 
primary key

arguments.name: ACTION
arguments.description:
The action to perform (e.g., list-relationships, 
create-relationship)

commands.description:
Data Model relationship operations. Actions: 
list-relationships, read-relationship, create-relationship, update-relationship,
delete-relationship.

commands.name: range
commands.description:
Range operations. Actions: get-values, set-values, 
get-formulas, set-formulas, get-number-formats, set-number-format, 
set-number-formats, clear-all, clear-contents, clear-formats, copy, copy-values,
copy-formulas, get-used-range, get-current-region, get-info, insert-cells, 
delete-cells, insert-rows, delete-rows, insert-columns, delete-columns, find, 
replace, sort, get-style, set-style, format-range, validate-range, 
get-validation, remove-validation, auto-fit-columns, auto-fit-rows, merge-cells,
unmerge-cells, get-merge-info, add-hyperlink, remove-hyperlink, list-hyperlinks,
get-hyperlink, set-cell-lock, get-cell-lock.

commands.name: session
close
commands.description: Close a session. Use --save to persist changes.

arguments.name: FILE
arguments.description: Path to the new Excel file to create

commands.description:
Create a new Excel file, open it, and create a 
session.

commands.name: list
commands.description: List active sessions.

commands.name: open

arguments.name: FILE
arguments.description: Path to the Excel file to open

commands.description: Open an Excel file and create a session.

commands.name: save
commands.description: Save a session without closing it.

Session management. WORKFLOW: open -> use sessionId 
-> close (--save to persist).
